items.title: Follow live: USWNT looks to bounce back in third friendly against Japan
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Coetzee replaces the injured Payne at SRH for remainder of IPL 2026
items.summary: SRH have had poor luck with their overseas seamers, having to bring in replacements for Jack Edwards and Brydon Carse, and now David Payne, but should get Pat Cummins back soon
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Renard sacked as Saudi Arabia coach ahead of World Cup
items.summary: Renard, a two-time Africa Cup of Nations winner with Zambia and Ivory Coast, led Saudi Arabia from 2019 to 2023 before being replaced by Roberto Mancini
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
